features.title: Conformance target lang.python
features.description: Explicit governed conformance target for generated Python package parity with canonical contract sources. Added under adr:1001.

features.title: Conformance target lang.rust
features.description: Explicit governed conformance target for generated Rust package parity with canonical contract sources. Added under adr:1001.

features.title: Conformance target lang.typescript
features.description: Explicit governed conformance target for generated TypeScript package parity with canonical contract sources. Added under adr:1001.

features.title: Conformance target jsonschema.2020-12
features.description: Explicit governed conformance target for JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 contract schema validity. Added under adr:1001.

features.title: Conformance target base64
features.description: Explicit governed conformance target for Base64-encoded contract fields such as scope query_string contentEncoding. Added under adr:1001.

features.title: Conformance target asgi.core
features.description: Explicit target for ASGI core callable conformance.

features.title: Conformance target http.semantics
features.description: Explicit HTTP semantics target for RFC 9110.

features.title: Conformance target websocket.http2
features.description: Explicit WebSocket over HTTP/2 target for RFC 8441.

features.title: Conformance target websocket.http3
features.description: Explicit WebSocket over HTTP/3 target for RFC 9220.

features.title: Conformance target sse.whatwg-eventsource
features.description: Explicit WHATWG EventSource target for SSE behavior.

features.title: Conformance target quic
features.description: Explicit QUIC target for WebTransport-related transport assumptions.

features.title: Conformance target json
features.description: Explicit RFC 8259 JSON target for payload and schema JSON.

features.title: Conformance target json.canonical
features.description: Explicit RFC 8785 JCS target for canonical artifacts, manifests, checksums, and snapshots.

features.title: Conformance target json.duplicate-key-canonical
features.description: Explicit duplicate-key rejection target for canonical JSON paths.

features.title: Conformance evidence target interop.autobahn
features.description: Accepted optional external evidence target for Autobahn WebSocket tests.

features.title: Conformance evidence target interop.wpt
features.description: Accepted optional external evidence target for Web Platform Tests.

features.title: Conformance evidence target interop.jsonschema-test-suite
features.description: Accepted optional external evidence target for JSON Schema Test Suite.

features.title: Conformance evidence target interop.asgi-downstream
features.description: Accepted optional external evidence target for downstream ASGI/runtime suites.

features.title: Gate target conformance
features.description: Explicit gate family target for conformance checks.

features.title: Gate target certification
features.description: Explicit gate family target for release certification checks.

features.title: Gate target promotion
features.description: Explicit gate family target for promoted candidate integrity.

features.title: Gate target release
features.description: Explicit gate family target for GitHub release creation from promoted artifacts.

features.title: Gate target publish
features.description: Explicit gate family target for package publication from promoted artifacts.

adrs.title: Canonical registry is a single JSON document
Features are the targetable units
Issues are plannable work items
Entity-centric registry with a derived graph export
Normalized prefixed IDs
Claim status and claim tier are orthogonal
Feature implementation state is separate from lifecycle state
Immutable boundary and release snapshots
Fail-closed guards
Generated projections are non-canonical
Explicit schema versioning
Portable SSOT core with repo-specific evidence adapters
Enforce max path and filename lengths under `.ssot`
Profiles are reusable feature bundles with derived pass status
Separate event types, subevents, and direction taxonomy
Conformance targets are explicit governed targets
ASGI3 trifecta conformance profile
Protocol standards conformance profile
Frame and payload serialization targets
Generated package and language parity targets
External interoperability evidence policy
Gate taxonomy for conformance and release
Publishing targets and registry release policy
Repository tree and generated artifact ownership
Conformance target representation in SSOT
Conformance evidence retention policy
